description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun featuring a striking red and black color scheme with bold, stylized patterns along the slide and suppressor. The handgun is equipped with a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, which is also decorated with the same vivid red and orange motifs. The grip is black, ergonomically contoured, and appears to be made of a durable polymer, contrasting with the more visually ornate upper components. The trigger guard is robust and smoothly integrated into the frame, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide is adorned with large, graphic designs, possibly stylized flames or abstract shapes, and lacks visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers. The magazine base is flat and black, seamlessly blending with the grip and lacking any visible embellishments or extensions.
description: A modern semi-automatic handgun with a vivid red and black patterned slide and suppressor, paired with a black ergonomic grip. The design is visually striking, with bold graphics and a long, cylindrical suppressor.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with the red and black patterning most prominent on the suppressor.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view reveals the full length of the suppressor, the detailed red and orange patterns on the slide and suppressor, and the black grip and trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the suppressor and slide, with the grip and magazine base visible below, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and the continuation of the red pattern.
description_view_3: The right-side profile mirrors the left, displaying the same bold red and orange graphics on the slide and suppressor, with the black grip and trigger guard clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is black, ergonomically contoured, and appears to be constructed from a durable polymer. It features a smooth surface with subtle texturing for improved handling, and the backstrap is slightly curved for comfort. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments, giving it a clean, functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and smoothly rounded, providing ample space for finger placement. It is of medium thickness, with a gentle curvature and no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. The surface is smooth and untextured, blending seamlessly with the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The handgun features a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it an extended profile. The suppressor is decorated with bold red and orange patterns, and the barrel itself is not visibly ported or fluted. No external markings or compensator features are apparent.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide is adorned with large, stylized graphic patterns in red, orange, and yellow, resembling flames or abstract shapes. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations present on the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat, black, and flush with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any extensions, finger rests, logos, or texturing, presenting a simple and streamlined appearance.
